variants.title: Fleetguard AF1669 Air Filter | Replaces the Donaldson P530642
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AF1669 Air Filter | Replaces the Donaldson P530642
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF1669 air filtration products are designed to effectively reduce the amount of damage-causing dust and dirt particles that make their way into your equipment’s engine.  Every Fleetguard product meets or surpasses the quality and performance standards required by a new engine.
specifications: Style: Air Primary, Round, Efficiency 1: ISO 5011, Outer Diameter: 203.2 mm, Inner Diameter: 165.1 mm, Length: 55.1 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: ISO 5011

variants.title: Donaldson P530642 Air Primary, Round
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P530642 Air Primary, Round provides clean, efficient airflow for engines by trapping airborne contaminants. Its round design maximizes filtration surface area while maintaining high airflow rates. Perfect for heavy-duty applications, this air primary filter enhances engine longevity and supports consistent performance.
specifications: Style: Air Primary, Round, Efficiency 1: ISO 5011, Outer Diameter: 203.2 mm, Inner Diameter: 165.1 mm, Length: 55.1 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: ISO 5011
